ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., home win, away win, draw) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee FOREIGN KEY ("referee") REFERENCES referees ("referee_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the league was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the tournament was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "shots_on_target_home" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "shots_on_target_away" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "yellow_cards_home" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the home team */,
  "yellow_cards_away" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the away team */,
  "red_cards_home" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the home team */,
  "red_cards_away" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the away team */,
  "ball_possession_home" REAL /* Percentage of ball possession by the home team */,
  "ball_possession_away" REAL /* Percentage of ball possession by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting odd */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the odd belongs to */,
  "home_odds" REAL /* Odds of the home team winning */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds of a draw */,
  "away_odds" REAL /* Odds of the away team winning */,
  "over_under_odds" REAL /* Odds of the total goals scored being over or under the line */,
  "over_under_line" REAL /* Line for the over/under bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match version */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league statistic */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the statistic belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played in the league */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored in the league */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded in the league */,
  "average_goals_per_match" REAL /* Average number of goals scored per match in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_statistics_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the position belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league position */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the position belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the position belongs to */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the league */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_positions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_positions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the referee */,
  "fifa_badge_number" INTEGER /* FIFA badge number of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
